property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;c:\Users	rand\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users	rand\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users	rand\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.2.10-hotspot in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Tool;C: lutter in;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;%JAVA_HOME% in;C:\Program Files\cursoresources\app in;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\170\Tools\Binn\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\apache-maven-3.9.12-bin\apache-maven-3.9.12 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Users	rand\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users	rand\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users	rand\AppData\Roaming

oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: testLoginScenarios[, cityslicka, 400, Missing email or username](3)
testcase.system-out:

testcase.name: testLoginScenarios[notexist@reqres.in, wrongpass, 400, user not found](4)

Request method: POST Request URI: https://reqres.in/api/login Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: x-api-key=pub_0e30a5c7ce45a945c2000c6925cb61a3 Accept=application/json Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "password": "wrongpass", "email": "notexist@reqres.in" } HTTP/1.1 400 Bad Request Date: Tue, 24 Mar 2026 07:39:14 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length: 26 Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Cache-Control: no-store Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin Etag: W/"1a-EGIcyP6BIiCXl5Gb1aph5CGf4VQ" Nel: {"report_to":"heroku-nel","response_headers":["Via"],"max_age":3600,"success_fraction":0.01,"failure_fraction":0.1} Origin-Agent-Cluster: ?1 Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin Report-To: {"group":"heroku-nel","endpoints":[{"url":"https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=Fw1qiplZRNhbzPe26whxQYCuDliZq7%2FxJYkFTpIsIyo%3D\u0026sid=c4c9725f-1ab0-44d8-820f-430df2718e11\u0026ts=1774337954"}],"max_age":3600} Reporting-Endpoints: heroku-nel="https://nel.heroku.com/reports?s=Fw1qiplZRNhbzPe26whxQYCuDliZq7%2FxJYkFTpIsIyo%3D&sid=c4c9725f-1ab0-44d8-820f-430df2718e11&ts=1774337954" Server: cloudflare Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains Via: 1.1 heroku-router X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff X-Dns-Prefetch-Control: off X-Download-Options: noopen X-Frame-Options: DENY X-Permitted-Cross-Domain-Policies: none X-Powered-By: ReqRes.in - Deploy backends in 30 seconds X-Ratelimit-Limit: 250 X-Ratelimit-Remaining: 173 X-Ratelimit-Reset: 1774396800 X-Reqres-Docs: https://reqres.in X-Reqres-Message: This API is powered by ReqRes.
